    deleteByColor(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Deletes all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
    deleteByCoordinates(long, int, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Updates or inserts a pixel at specific coordinates (upsert operation).
    deleteByLayer(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Deletes all pixels in a specific layer.
    deleteByPalette(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteColorDao
    Deletes all colors in a specific palette.
    deleteByProject(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Deletes all autosave snapshots for a specific project.
    deleteByProject(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Deletes all export history records for a specific project.
    deleteOlderThan(long, long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Deletes autosave snapshots older than a specific snapshot ID for a project.
    deleteOlderThan(long, long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Deletes export history records older than a specific export record.
    deleteOldSnapshots(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Deletes old autosave snapshots for a project, keeping only the most recent N snapshots.

    Implementation of ProjectRepository providing project data operations.
    purgeDeleted(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao
    Permanently deletes all projects marked as deleted for a specific user.

    searchByName(long, String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao
    Retrieves projects by name search (case-insensitive partial match).
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Retrieves an autosave snapshot by its ID.
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Retrieves an export history record by its ID.
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.LayerDao
    Retrieves a layer by its ID.
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteColorDao
    Retrieves a palette color by its ID.
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteDao
    Retrieves a palette by its ID.
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Retrieves a pixel by its ID.
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao
    Retrieves a project by its ID.
    select(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.UserDao
    Retrieves a user by their ID.
    selectAll() - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Retrieves all export history records across all projects, ordered by export time (most recent first).
    selectAll() - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.UserDao
    Retrieves all users from the database, ordered by username.
    selectAllByUser(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao
    Retrieves all projects (including deleted) for a specific user.
    selectByColor(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Retrieves all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
    selectByColorValue(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteColorDao
    Retrieves all colors with a specific color value within a palette.
    selectByCoordinates(long, int, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Retrieves a specific pixel at the given coordinates within a layer.
    selectByEmail(String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.UserDao
    Retrieves a user by their email address.
    selectByFormat(long, String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Retrieves export history records for a specific project and file format.
    selectByLayer(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Retrieves all pixels for a specific layer.
    selectByName(long, String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteDao
    Retrieves a palette by name for a specific user.
    selectByOauthKey(String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.UserDao
    Retrieves a user by their OAuth key.
    selectByOrder(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteColorDao
    Retrieves a palette color by its position within the palette.
    selectByPalette(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteColorDao
    Retrieves all colors for a specific palette, ordered by color order.
    selectByProject(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Retrieves all autosave snapshots for a specific project, ordered by creation time (most recent first).
    selectByProject(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Retrieves all export history records for a specific project, ordered by export time (most recent first).
    selectByProject(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.LayerDao
    Retrieves all layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order (Z-index).
    selectByRegion(long, int, int, int, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao
    Retrieves pixels within a specific rectangular region of a layer.
    selectByResolution(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Retrieves export history records for a specific project and resolution.
    selectByUser(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteDao
    Retrieves all palettes for a specific user, ordered by last used (most recent first).
    selectByUser(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao
    Retrieves all projects for a specific user, ordered by last edited timestamp (most recent first).
    selectByUsername(String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.UserDao
    Retrieves a user by their username.
    selectByUserOrderedByName(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteDao
    Retrieves all palettes for a specific user, ordered by palette name.
    selectByUserOrderedByName(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao
    Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user, ordered by project name.
    selectCustomByUser(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteDao
    Retrieves all custom (user-created) palettes for a specific user.
    selectDefaultPalettes() - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteDao
    Retrieves all default (system-provided) palettes.
    selectDeletedByUser(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ProjectDao
    Retrieves all deleted projects for a specific user (for recovery functionality).
    selectMostRecent(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Retrieves the most recent autosave snapshot for a specific project.
    selectMostRecent(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Retrieves the most recent export record for a specific project.
    selectRecent(int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.ExportHistoryDao
    Retrieves a limited number of recent export records across all projects.
    selectRecentByProject(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Retrieves a limited number of recent autosave snapshots for a specific project.
    selectUnlockedByProject(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.LayerDao
    Retrieves all unlocked layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order.
    selectVisibleByProject(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.LayerDao
    Retrieves all visible layers for a specific project, ordered by layer order.

    Updates multiple existing palettes in the database.

    Updates multiple existing palette colors in the database.

    Updates an existing pixel in the database.
    update(Pixel...) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PixelDao

    Updates the color value of a specific pixel.

    Updates the color order for a specific palette color.
    updateColorValue(long, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao.PaletteColorDao
    Updates the color value for a specific palette color.

    Updates the last used timestamp for a palette.

    Updates the layer order for a specific layer.

    Updates the opacity of a layer.
